title: Historical Portfolio Value
description: 30-day rolling historical portfolio value with open/close/high/low per token per day. Build P&L charts, portfolio performance dashboards, and DeFi fund trackers. Foundational chains only.
useCase: Build a 30-day portfolio performance chart with per-token OHLC data — show gains, losses, and asset allocation change over time.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational EVM chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
